events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

events.agenda: 17:30 Registration; 18:00 Welcome; 18:15 Common pitfalls when building a data warehouse; 18:45 Using Snowflake Cortex Search Service; 19:15-20:30 Networking with Food & Drinks.
events.event_description: This dbt Meetup is an opportunity for the local Munich dbt and Snowflake community to connect and collaborate.
events.location: Synabi Business Solutions GmbH, Oskar-Schlemmer-Straße 13, München
events.raw_text:
Thu, Feb 20, 2025 · 5:30 PM to 8:30 PM CET

18:15 Common pitfalls when building a data warehouse - Tim Hiebenthal (Project A Ventures)
18:45 Using the Snowflake Cortex Search Service to Interact with Your Documents - Maja Ferle (In516ht)

talks.description: Common pitfalls when building a data warehouse, like inconsistent metrics and slow response times, and how to build a robust, adaptable data warehouse.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Over the years, we have collected a list of best practices to avoid common pitfalls like inconsistent metrics and slow response times. Discover how to build a robust and adaptable data warehouse that fosters trust and alignment between data teams and stakeholders.
talks.title: Common pitfalls when building a data warehouse

talks.description: Building a RAG (retrieval augmented generation) solution to chat with PDF documents using Snowflake Cortex LLM functions and Cortex Search service.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: This session, will demonstrate how to quick and easy it is to build a RAG (retrieval augmented generation) solution that enables us to chat with pdf documents in natural language.
talks.title: Using the Snowflake Cortex Search Service to Interact with Your Documents
